entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being evaluated for resistance to grain mold.

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting the grains of sorghum.

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum accessions to resist grain mold infection.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which the sorghum accessions were reevaluated.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research institution where the grain mold nursery was located.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific location of the ICRISAT center.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted.

entities.name: PHYSIO-MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: The set of physical and physiological characteristics used to characterize the sorghum accessions.

entities.name: PANICLE GRAIN MOLD RATING
entities.description: A visual scoring system used to evaluate the level of grain mold resistance.

entities.name: TIME TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days required for 50% of the plants to flower.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the sorghum plants.

entities.name: PANICLE TYPE
entities.description: The structural classification of the sorghum panicle, ranging from loose to compact.

entities.name: GLUMES COVERAGE OF GRAINS
entities.description: The percentage of the grain covered by glumes.

entities.name: GLUMES COLOR
entities.description: The color of the glumes, ranging from straw to black.

entities.name: GRAIN COLOR
entities.description: The color of the sorghum grains, ranging from white to dark brown.

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD RESISTANCE BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing sorghum varieties with resistance to grain mold.
